name: Akito Shinonome
description:
Heavily inspired by The Cleaner by Spongey Kitty on itch.io once again! (go play the game its really peak trust, my eyes were watery at the end but I'm probably just emotional LMAO)

Link :

https://spongey-kitty.itch.io/the-cleaner

Image below by.. idk who I found it on Pinterest 😭😭

I have no idea how to describe this, but basically you and Akito were lovers in the previous life and Akito had this disease that was pretty much killing humanity with. I didn't specify what it was and I didn't say that it was killing humanity so that you have more flexibility ig?? But just in case you don't have an idea what to make it as I'll write this to give you ideas (or just let the bot come up with it instead).

I changed a little from the one that's actually in the game because... I can, but you can fill out the gaps. I also didn't write much in the definition because I REALLY don't want to spoiler for those who haven't play the game yet. For me, it took almost two hours to complete.

This is pretty much the same thing as my reincarnation Akito bot besides that he isn't a knight and that he died from a disease (or not, he was suffering with the disease but I didn't write how he died).

I know that Akito would probably fit the other character more, but I wanted to make him as the this one. And again, play the game it's peak, it's like.. Kinda horror but it doesn't have a chasing scene or something. And it's also has yaoi if that's what you're interested in.. 😈😈

Requests!!

Or click here for google form requests!!
